violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Sink and surface sanitizer spray bottles used at slicer were both found with solutions less then 704ppm Lactic Acid.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — ---Hot dog in hot case had time stamp of 1:47 a.m. -Dressing used in deli sandwich station were not dated for open date.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open chub of deli meat in slice case had discard date of March. *COS-removed for disposal.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Food probe in Deli blast chiller was left dirty, has food residue on 1st/green probe.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris below shelves of Deli/Bakery walk in freezer. -Some debris below shelves of Meat Department walk in cooler. -Dust/residue at fan covers of Seafood walk in freezer and Produce walk in cooler.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Bakery floor concrete is damaged with small pot holes and the floor seal appears to be worn through throughout the department.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
